item.title: Comparison of methylene blue dye-based chromoendoscopy and Fujifilm virtual chromoendoscopy (blue light imaging and linked color imaging) for dysplasia detection in inflammatory bowel disease: a prospective single-center randomized study.
The Evolution of the Management of Dysplasia in Ulcerative Colitis.
item.description: Cancers - Review - With modern medicine and a better understanding of the ulcerative colitis disease process, there have been many changes in how we manage ulcerative colitis-related dysplasia over the past 20 years....

item.title: The role of extracellular vesicles in the transport and regulation of novel inflammatory mediators in IBD and its associated CRC.
item.description: Frontiers in cell and developmental biology - Review - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), comprising ulcerative colitis (UC) and Crohn's disease (CD), is a chronic inflammation of the gut characterized by an imbalance in the intestinal microbiome and ec...

item.title: Enterococcus-driven metabolite-host gene networks in IBD-associated colorectal carcinogenesis: integrative multi-omics and experimental validation.
item.description: Frontiers in cell and developmental biology - This study aims to elucidate the role of Enterococcusin the progression from inflammatory bowel disease to colorectal cancer (CRC), with a focus on identifying key metabolites and host genes regula...
